Gas Prices Today, June 5: Check fuel latest rates in California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Pennsylvania as National Average sees a dip

regions.why: Oil prices are falling and Saskatchewan is down 10¢ from last week. Current price sits just 3% above the local low, suggesting prices have stabilized near a floor. Crude momentum is downward but retail lag means further drops take time.
